feed.title: AO3 - Dick Grayson/Jason Todd (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Dick Grayson/Jason Todd on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Afterglow
entry.summary:
Author: HawthorneWren

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,044Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 22

Summary: On the eve of a Wayne family wedding, the family celebrates love, friendship, and happily-ever-afters. While Tim and Damian prepare to begin their forever, old desires and old wounds resurface for Jason and Dick, forcing them to reexamine a love story they thought had ended years ago.

entry.title: The Tragedy of Bruce Wayne
entry.summary:
Author: Gaynightwing03

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 94,878Chapters: 35/?Kudos: 1,478

Summary: After a devastating betrayal leaves Damian Wayne questioning everything he thought he knew about his family, Dick Grayson finds himself forced into a role he never expected: protector, advocate, and perhaps even father. As old wounds resurface and long-buried truths come to light, the Batfamily must confront not only what was done to Damian, but the patterns that have shaped all of their lives. Faced with impossible choices, they begin asking a question none of them ever dared consider before: What happens when the mission is no longer worth the cost?

entry.title: You Are Out of My League
entry.summary:
Author: ivebeenbamboozled (brainwitchletty)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 659,637Chapters: 60/60Kudos: 1,839

Summary: The story begins with a new Robin to replace the old, with Nightwing none the wiser to being replaced at all, and suddenly he has a little brother within the same terrible day. It takes a while to accept, but Dick quickly learns this new Robin-- Jason Todd-- is exactly what Dick Grayson was always missing in his life, and in many more ways than one. Through the years with the team and working with the Justice League, Jason finds a place for himself and becomes a vital member of the Young Justice League while also becoming a vital centerpiece in Dick's life. And when all that ends-- when Jason Todd is taken away from Dick-- it's going to be even harder to put his life back together with that emptiness returning once more. . . . Mostly canon compliant story detailing Jason's introduction to the Young Justice League as Robin, his eventual death, and Dick discovering the mysterious red-hooded figure acting as Ra's Al Ghul's bodyguard is a lot more familiar than he should be.

entry.title: Birds of Prey
entry.summary:
Author: Castle53

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,343Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 33

Summary: Jason Todd was expecting an interesting year. He wasn't expecting his entire past to be thrown into his lap, but what can you do? Dick's been missing for two years. Even he doesn't know where he was. But he killed them all. Tim never thought of Bruce as a good father, but he never thought the man would stoop this far. Roy wants to get out of heroism, thank you very much. Arthur Fleck started the year with one adopted son, and now he's got four. Fantastic.   (Guys I'm a child and I'm broke, I can't pay for comics or art. If you want to gift art, I'd be very happy to take it, and I also do art trades, but I cannot pay for services. Thank you.)

entry.title: The Stray
entry.summary:
Author: Rustycrunch

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,219Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 5

Summary: Gotham does not forgive, and it does not forget. Neither does Samira Jimenez, local graduate student and local wannabe vigilante. When her father, a district attorney who dared to believe in a reformed city, is murdered, Samira is left with nothing but grief, a coin she cannot place, and a dangerous name whispered between criminals in the dark: Red Hood. Trained in the shadows by a cat-loving mentor who showed her what Gotham was really made of, Samira learned that trust often came with a cost. Her pain had no room in these dark streets. And finding out the truth of her father's murder could lead her down a path that she'd spent her life fighting against. But Gotham's truths are never simple, and the man she has been hunting is not the killer she imagined. In a city where every light casts a longer shadow, Samira must decide what justice really means and how much of herself she is willing to lose to find it.

entry.title: Dreams come multiple times
entry.summary:
Author: VanyKruemelPendragon

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,970Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 40

Summary: It wasn’t uncommon for Jason to want to murder his best friend, Roy. It was something he joked about often, but when the Roy-organised blind date turns out to be the one porn star he had a crush on? The twenty-five to life charge doesn't seem too bad.

entry.title: Tired Stars
entry.summary:
Author: ResidentJazz

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 94,417Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 539

Summary: Dick Grayson has always known how to smile on command, how to play the part people expect — even when it tears him apart. After a public breakdown and a mission that pushes him past his limits, Bruce’s disappointment feels like another verdict he can’t escape. But Jason refuses to let him spiral alone. In the quiet of a safe house, between coffee that tastes like ash, late-night movies, and the weight of a case too close to home, Dick has to confront the question he’s never dared to ask: who is he when he isn’t what Bruce made him? One step at a time, he’ll have to find out.

entry.title: Heatwave
entry.summary:
Author: whocannotsleep

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 104,032Chapters: 12/12Kudos: 282

Summary: The skin on his face burned, no, everything was burning. Air didn’t get past his nose, and Dick… he didn’t understand what was happening. His surroundings were… hot. The taste of smoke filtered through his teeth, drying out his tongue with every breath. Hell. That was the only thing his consciousness could manage to think. But then… he remembered the snow, freezing against his fingertips when he took off his glove. A different kind of burning in that moment and, and, and… a flash. Blue, red, purple, and finally, before his consciousness faded: black. or Dick is Nightwing, and Jason is the firefighter who discovered his identity.

entry.title: erotic electronic
entry.summary:
Author: thearkhamknightmare

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 531Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 14

Summary: "Nightwing?" Barbara says, but he can't bring himself to respond. There's too many things racing through his mind. Barbara was the first to mention it, giving him options on what they can do to get over the hurdle, but more people in the family probably saw it too. The mortification of knowing that his younger brothers probably saw the headlines hit hard in the moment. "Dick? Are you okay?" In that moment, Dick couldn't help but cry. "Fuck that prick," Dick says, ripping the communicator out of his ear. He has half a mind to chuck it off the side of the building, but doesn't. Instead, he switches it off and puts it right beside him. Same with the tracker in his domino mask. He just wanted to be alone. or: day four - leaked sex tape

entry.title: I'll Build You Back (Somehow)
entry.summary:
Author: WakingNightmares

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 86,147Chapters: 15/16Kudos: 636

Summary: Jason gives him an exasperated look as they get to the front door. “Seriously, Dick. I’m fine. Promise. I’ve had a helluva lot worse than this, and still managed a patrol, with a lot less sleep than this. I’ll take it easy, keep the ass-kickin’ to a minimum tonight, alright?” He says with a grin. And fuck the things Dick would do for that grin. It erases the hard edges, the cold and calculating Red Hood, leaving behind a mischievous looking young man, rather than a younger version of Bruce. So he sighs. “Fine. Just call me if you need anything, okay? I’m gonna be in town for a few days anyways, until we get this Two-Face thing figured out, so it’s not like it’s out of my way,” Dick says as he steps outside into the driveway. “Besides, it’d be nice to hang out more often.” Jason gives Dick an unsure look, and for a moment, Dick can feel his heart sink a bit. Did Jason not enjoy their breakfast? Dick had intruded, to be fair, but Jason had seemed to enjoy - “Yeah? You wanna hang?”

entry.title: bad believer
entry.summary:
Author: aikane

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,444Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 85

Summary: Everyone in Gotham, it seems, is familiar with the story of Richard Wayne: the playboy billionaire's ward turned strip-club headliner. The details are murky, as they always are, but the facts of the matter are that one day Richard was living the good life under the protective eye of his adoptive father Bruce Wayne, and the next he was spotted on the stage of the seedy downtown nightclub "Titans". It doesn't explain what he's doing in Jason's church, however.

entry.title: The Dynamic Duo
entry.summary:
Author: sarriathmg

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 40,001Chapters: 6/34Kudos: 236

Summary: Having been Batman for four years, Dick Grayson still hasn't gotten used to the cowl. Now, investigating a mass disappearance case, Dick meets a young street rat who's had friends tangled up in the same web. Jason Todd has all the traits Dick saw in himself when he first started—curious, shrewd, agile, and, most importantly, wanting to do good. Despite Dick's initial rejection of the boy, he starts to think that a long-term partnership isn't a bad idea. Perhaps four years have been long enough time for the current stasis. Perhaps, he thinks, it's time for his own Robin.

  • Attempted Seduction
  • Kidnapped Jason Todd
  • Minor Character Death

entry.title: Jason Art Collection (SFW)
entry.summary:
Author: sarriathmg

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 0Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 1,106

Summary: Since I've gotten more into drawing sfw art lately, here's a separate post for that.Jason-centric with some ships (depending on my whims).

entry.title: Like a House Afire
entry.summary:
Author: mynameisjessejk

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,167Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 151

Summary: This was not exactly what Bruce wanted when he suggested a Malone collaboration to prevent the Two-Facers from blowing up the entire leadership of the Irish Mob, but he probably should've expected it once Jason and Dick got involved. It is the perfect opportunity to introduce Steph to the Malones' world, though.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Dick Grayson/Jason Todd
  • Jason Todd
  • Dick Grayson
  • Bruce Wayne
  • Stephanie Brown
  • Jason Todd is Red Hood
  • Dick Grayson is Robbie Malone
  • Bruce Wayne is Matches Malone
  • Stephanie Brown is also a Malone
  • Named Anne primarily so Jason can make Anne of Green Gables references
  • The Irish Mob are not going to be happy about this
  • but they should be grateful
  • Red Hood and the Malones negotiate
